data.title: Cloud-Based Infrastructure
data.description: Leverages scalable cloud infrastructure to handle vast amounts of data and computations.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes platforms like AWS or Azure for elasticity, ensuring rapid deployment and scaling.

data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Decentralized architecture enabling independent scaling and deployment of services.
data.technical_spec: Contains loosely coupled services managed via containers and orchestrated through Kubernetes.

data.title: Serverless Computation
data.description: Employs serverless technology for executing code without infrastructure management.
data.technical_spec: Uses AWS Lambda or similar services for on-demand, event-driven computing.

data.title: APIs and Integrations
data.description: Extensive API interfaces for external service integration and data interchange.
data.technical_spec: RESTful APIs with JSON for lightweight interoperability and streaming data capabilities.

data.title: Data Security Layer
data.description: Implements multiple layers of data protection for privacy preservation and compliance.
data.technical_spec: Encryption and tokenization protocols integrated throughout data pipelines.
